prompt: Add middleware chaining support so multiple middlewares can be composed before the handler

turns.content:
<task>
Add middleware chaining support so multiple middlewares can be composed before the handler
</task>

arguments.summary: Read Mux with Middleware type defined but no chaining. Has basic path routing. Need to add Use() method for global middlewares and Chain() for composing multiple middlewares.

next_steps.description: Add middlewares slice to Mux struct, Use(mw) method to append, and update ServeHTTP to apply middleware chain around the matched handler
Add Chain(middlewares...) helper function that composes middlewares right-to-left, test with logging + auth middlewares

arguments.command: cd /workspace && go build ./... && go test ./pkg/mux/ -v 2>&1 | tail -10

turns.content:
=== RUN   TestBasicRouting
--- PASS: TestBasicRouting (0.00s)
=== RUN   TestMiddlewareChain
--- PASS: TestMiddlewareChain (0.00s)
PASS

arguments.summary: Added Use() for global middlewares, Chain() helper for composing multiple middlewares, and updated ServeHTTP to apply middleware chain. Middlewares wrap handler right-to-left (first added = outermost). Tests pass.
arguments.final_answer:
Added middleware chaining to pkg/mux/mux.go:
- Use(mw) appends global middleware
- Chain(mw...) composes multiple middlewares into one
- ServeHTTP applies chain right-to-left around matched handler
- All tests pass
